qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SSRF via workflow import URL endpoint permits unauthorized internal network and metadata access
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes improper file access controls (CWE-367 TOCTOU) allowing authenticated users to read arbitrary files from the n8n host via file-system-interacting nodes ('Read/Write Files from Disk' and 'Git' nodes). This finding describes SSRF via the workflow import-from-url endpoint (GET /workflows/from-url) due to missing URL destination validation. While both affect n8n and require authentication, the root causes are different: missing URL validation (SSRF) vs. missing file access controls (arbitrary file read). The vulnerable code locations (workflows.controller.ts vs. file access node logic), attack paths, and security consequences are distinct.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory (GHSA-gfvg-qv54-r4pc) describes improper file access controls (CWE-367 TOCTOU race condition) in n8n's file-system-interacting nodes ('Read/Write Files from Disk' and 'Git' nodes) that allow authenticated users to read arbitrary files from the host system. The sole qualifying finding 'ssrf-workflow-import-url' describes SSRF via the workflow import-from-url endpoint in n8n due to missing URL validation — same application but different vulnerable code (workflows.controller.ts:321 vs. file access node logic), different root cause (URL validation bypass vs. file access control bypass/TOCTOU), and different impact (internal network/metadata access vs. arbitrary host file read).
evidence: Advisory CWE is CWE-367 (TOCTOU race condition) in file access controls for 'Read/Write Files from Disk' and 'Git' nodes
Finding 'ssrf-workflow-import-url' does not reference TOCTOU, file access controls, or the file-system-interacting workflow nodes mentioned in the advisory
Finding targets the correct n8n repo but at a different endpoint (GET /workflows/from-url) with different vulnerable code (workflows.controller.ts:321, import-workflow-from-url.dto.ts:5)
No finding references the 'Read/Write Files from Disk' node, 'Git' node, or any file-path traversal/symlink race condition mechanism
